published.text:
### Title
CRM & Lead Follow-Up Automation for a Vehicle Accessories E-Commerce Brand

### Subtitle
How a Houston-made vehicle accessories e-commerce brand reactivated 5,600+ old leads and automated client management, follow-ups, and sales handoff

### Case Study Summary Card
Industry: Vehicle Accessories e-commerce brand
Challenge: 5,600+ old leads sitting in spreadsheets with no systematic reactivation or client follow-up.
Solution: Built full Supabase CRM, client-management workflows, and n8n automated follow-up sequences for all lead pools.
Key Result: 3x team capacity.

### Outcome
The public case study preserves the commercial proof, including 5,600+ reactivated leads, automated client management, automated follow-ups, and 3x team capacity, while removing the public client URL, founder name, and company name.
